issues.title: Please help improve the response speed of the model when using tools.
issues.body:
Tools can significantly impact a model's response speed. How is everyone addressing this issue?

When I ask 99999*99999=?

model： qwen-max

tool: Calculator

use tool: 12s

no tool: 3s

Significant differences were found in speed.

comments.body: @jingbio Since the client application controls the tool call execution before returning the response back to the model, the response speed depends on various factors on how the tool execution happened including the roundtrip of the request/response invocations from and to the model and the client. Closing this for now but feel free to re-open if you want to continue the discussion on this topic. Thanks!
